fato_historico: 1979: The oil tanker SS Atlantic Empress collides with another oil tanker, causing the largest ever ship-borne oil spill.
energia_do_dia: The cosmos suggests you may channel intense currents today, perhaps feeling like a powerful vessel navigating vast, unknown tides. Just as the sea absorbs challenges, you can transmute your passionate energy into something transformative. It is a good time to release past heavy burdens and allow your natural, resilient spirit to shine through the surrounding ripples of change.
frase_do_dia: Your inner light is a beacon even amidst the deepest, shifting ocean tides.
significado_numero: Represents the start of a new, optimistic cycle of personal growth.
conselho: Consider letting go of old anchors to sail toward brighter, calmer horizons today.
